title: Applicability to demand for dissolution of mineral lease
doc_html:
§209.  Applicability to demand for dissolution of mineral lease

The right to secure damages and attorney's fees under Article 207 is applicable also to a demand for dissolution of a mineral lease for failure to comply with its obligations.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §209, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
